error_signature: only first node executes in webhook test
title: Only first node executes in webhook test mode
symptom: When testing a workflow using the webhook node, only the first node executes, preventing further processing and response generation.
not_this_if: Running the workflow in production mode
Starting the workflow from the canvas
root_cause: When the workflow is started directly from the webhook node, it only executes that node and does not proceed to subsequent nodes. This is due to the configuration of the webhook node to respond immediately, halting further execution.
fix_steps: Start the workflow from the canvas instead of the webhook node
Use one of the test buttons to initiate the workflow
Copy the test webhook URL into Postman
Make a request from Postman to see the complete output
agent_instruction: Start the workflow from the canvas and use the test buttons to execute the entire workflow.
